title: Cosine Similarity for Retrieval
description: Implement cosine similarity — the core of vector search.
problem: Write cosine_similarity(a, b) that takes two lists of floats and returns their cosine similarity (a float between -1 and 1). Do not use any external libraries.
starter_code:
import math

def cosine_similarity(a, b):
    # dot product / (magnitude_a * magnitude_b)
    return 0.0  # fix this
hint: dot = sum(x*y for x,y in zip(a,b)). magnitude = math.sqrt(sum(x*x for x in v)). Return dot/(mag_a*mag_b).
